heading: Gifts and donations
label: 1131e Gifts and donations
text: The Institute is authorized to receive money and other property donated, bequeathed, or devised to the Institute with or without a condition of restriction, for the purpose of providing financial support for the fellowships or underwriting the cost of the Junior Year Abroad Program. All funds or property given, devised, or bequeathed shall be retained in a separate account, and an accounting of those funds and property shall be included in the report described in .section 1131d of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 629, and is classified to .section 628 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1131f of this title

Amendments2008—, substituted “report described in section 1131d” for “annual report described in section 1131d”.Pub. L. 110–315, § 6191998—, made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 105–244, § 603(f)section 1131d of this title
